news.title:
GMR Airports served 32 mn passengers in Q4 FY26, up 0.9% YoY.
FY26 traffic hit 121 mn; Delhi, Hyderabad, Goa airports set new records.
news.summary:
GMR Airports served 32 mn passengers in Q4 FY26, up 0.9% YoY.
FY26 traffic hit 121 mn; Delhi, Hyderabad, Goa airports set new records.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd to participate in HSBC Global Investment Summit 2026 on Apr 14-15 in Hong Kong.
Meetings include one-on-one and group discussions; investor presentation available on their website.
news.summary:
GMR Airports Ltd to participate in HSBC Global Investment Summit 2026 on Apr 14-15 in Hong Kong.
Meetings include one-on-one and group discussions; investor presentation available on their website.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd confirms interest payments on NCDs totaling Rs. 216.9 Cr as of Mar 30, 2026.
Interest payments aligned with bond terms; no delays reported; due date adjusted for non-business day.
news.summary:
GMR Airports Ltd confirms interest payments on NCDs totaling Rs. 216.9 Cr as of Mar 30, 2026.
Interest payments aligned with bond terms; no delays reported; due date adjusted for non-business day.

news.title:
Jefferies retains Buy on GMR Airports, targets Rs 125; notes stable domestic traffic, mid-teen non-aero growth.
Highlights Hyderabad capex from FY29, improving Goa traction, Bhogapuram early commissioning, and debt reduction focus.
news.summary:
Jefferies retains Buy on GMR Airports, targets Rs 125; notes stable domestic traffic, mid-teen non-aero growth.
Highlights Hyderabad capex from FY29, improving Goa traction, Bhogapuram early commissioning, and debt reduction focus.

news.title:
GMR Airports served 10.3 mn passengers in Feb, a 0.3% YoY growth.
YTD FY26 traffic crossed 111 mn; Delhi, Hyderabad airports saw strong cargo growth.
news.summary:
GMR Airports served 10.3 mn passengers in Feb, a 0.3% YoY growth.
YTD FY26 traffic crossed 111 mn; Delhi, Hyderabad airports saw strong cargo growth.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd received LOA from DIAL to manage Cargo Terminal 1 at IGI Airport.
The concession is on a revenue share model, projected Rs. 340 Cr in first year operations.
news.summary:
GMR Airports Ltd received LOA from DIAL to manage Cargo Terminal 1 at IGI Airport.
The concession is on a revenue share model, projected Rs. 340 Cr in first year operations.

news.title:
India plans Rs 91,000 crore airport infrastructure expansion, benefiting GMR Airports and Larsen & Toubro.
GMR Airports sees 32.7% stock rally; L&T's order book grows 30% YoY, marking strong project activities.
news.summary:
India plans Rs 91,000 crore airport infrastructure expansion, benefiting GMR Airports and Larsen & Toubro.
GMR Airports sees 32.7% stock rally; L&T's order book grows 30% YoY, marking strong project activities.

news.title:
GMR Airports executed an NSE block trade for 2,655,203 shares at Rs. 96.3.
The total transaction value of the trade amounted to Rs. 25.6 crores.
news.summary:
GMR Airports executed an NSE block trade for 2,655,203 shares at Rs. 96.3.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd shared the conference call transcript for Q3 FY25 results.
The transcript is available on the company's investor website for reference.

news.title:
GMR Airports surges 7% following robust Q3 performance, boosting investor sentiment.
Strong Q3 results are driving the rally in GMR Airports shares.
news.summary:
GMR Airports surges 7% following robust Q3 performance, boosting investor sentiment.

news.title: GMR Airports Q3 net profit declines 54% despite revenue growth.
news.summary: GMR Airports Q3 net profit declines 54% despite revenue growth.

news.title:
GMR Airports' income up 49% YoY to INR 4,083 Cr; EBITDA rose 65% YoY to INR 1,789 Cr.
Passenger traffic hit 31.9 mn; Hyderabad Airport declared dividend and raised INR 21bn via NCDs.
news.summary:
GMR Airports' income up 49% YoY to INR 4,083 Cr; EBITDA rose 65% YoY to INR 1,789 Cr.
Passenger traffic hit 31.9 mn; Hyderabad Airport declared dividend and raised INR 21bn via NCDs.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd confirms full utilization of proceeds from NCDs as per offer documents without deviation.
Remaining proceeds are yet to be utilized for specified end-use in offer documents for duty-free business concessions.
news.summary:
GMR Airports Ltd confirms full utilization of proceeds from NCDs as per offer documents without deviation.
Remaining proceeds are yet to be utilized for specified end-use in offer documents for duty-free business concessions.

news.title:
GMR Airports board approved Q3 FY26 financials, noting Rs 275.3 crore pre-tax losses.
Litigation affected asset values; Delhi and Hyderabad duty-free ops commenced.
news.summary:
GMR Airports board approved Q3 FY26 financials, noting Rs 275.3 crore pre-tax losses.
Litigation affected asset values; Delhi and Hyderabad duty-free ops commenced.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd to hold a board meeting on Feb 13, 2026, to approve Q3 FY2025 unaudited results.
Trading window for GMR Airports securities closed from Dec 31, 2025, till 48 hours post result declaration.
news.summary:
GMR Airports Ltd to hold a board meeting on Feb 13, 2026, to approve Q3 FY2025 unaudited results.
Trading window for GMR Airports securities closed from Dec 31, 2025, till 48 hours post result declaration.

news.title:
GMR Airports saw a block trade of ~2.3M shares at Rs. 89.84/share.
The trade on NSE totaled Rs. 20.65 Cr.
news.summary:
GMR Airports saw a block trade of ~2.3M shares at Rs. 89.84/share.

news.title:
GMR Airports served 90 mn passengers YTD FY26, up 0.9% YoY, with record 31.8 mn in Q3.
Delhi airport hit 2.53 lakh daily passengers; Hyderabad airport saw robust growth, credit rating improved.
news.summary:
GMR Airports served 90 mn passengers YTD FY26, up 0.9% YoY, with record 31.8 mn in Q3.
Delhi airport hit 2.53 lakh daily passengers; Hyderabad airport saw robust growth, credit rating improved.

news.title: GMR Airports traded 9.67M shares in a block deal at Rs 104.3.
news.summary: GMR Airports traded 9.67M shares in a block deal at Rs 104.3.

news.title:
GMR Airports Ltd acquired 49.9% equity in Delhi Duty Free Services from DIAL for Rs. 1.83B.
This raises GMR's stake to 66.93%, aiming to consolidate duty-free operations and explore opportunities.
news.summary:
GMR Airports Ltd acquired 49.9% equity in Delhi Duty Free Services from DIAL for Rs. 1.83B.
This raises GMR's stake to 66.93%, aiming to consolidate duty-free operations and explore opportunities.

news.title:
CARE Ratings assigned 'CARE A/Stable' and 'CARE A1' to GMR Airports Ltd's Rs. 500 Cr bank facilities.
CARE reaffirmed 'CARE A/Stable' for non-convertible bonds and existing bank facilities of the company.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings assigned 'CARE A/Stable' and 'CARE A1' to GMR Airports Ltd's Rs. 500 Cr bank facilities.
CARE reaffirmed 'CARE A/Stable' for non-convertible bonds and existing bank facilities of the company.
